concerns.text: FR-007 anchors to 'See Assumptions' rather than a specific User Story. While the Assumption section mentions computational constraints, FR-007 describes a functional system behavior (execution time limit) that should be explicitly anchored to a User Story (e.g., US-1 or a new non-functional story) to prevent it from being flagged as scope creep or orphaned.

SC-005 anchors to 'See FR-007' instead of a User Story. Success Criteria must trace back to a User Story/Goal to prove they measure user value. Since FR-007 is the only requirement mentioning the time limit, SC-005 should be re-anchored to the User Story that defines the operational context (likely US-1 or a derived story about pipeline execution).
